extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against the Company” row, which has 8 criminal proceedings, Nil tax proceedings, N.A. statutory/regulatory proceedings, and Nil civil litigation; the “By the Company” row and all “By” rows were excluded, while directors, promoters and the subsidiary have Nil against them. The aggregate quantified amount against the company and subsidiary is ₹33.10 million in the Against the Company row, converted to ₹3.31 crore; the ₹22.93 million recovered matter is included in the stated amount but remains pending, and no separate aggregate total against the group is stated. Contingent liabilities are taken from the stated total disclosed as “Claims against the Company not acknowledged as debts” of ₹6.36 million as of March 31, 2023, converted to ₹0.636 crore, without re-summing. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed; the percentages in the section relate to AUM, loans, disbursements, related-party transactions or other measures, not company-wide customer revenue. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
